title: polygala arenaria
intro: Polygala arenaria, also known as Rockbells or Milkwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Polygalaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Polygala arenaria include its ability to alleviate symptoms of asthma, reduce fever, and soothe digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, with some herbal preparations also including it in combination with other herbs to enhance its benefits.
